expectations: The response reads AGENTS.md at the vault root
The response reads the style guardrails file referenced by AGENTS.md
The response presents a summary of loaded context
cases.notes: Minimal trigger — must read BOTH AGENTS.md AND style guardrails (the mandatory chain)

expectations: The response runs the date command to establish temporal context
The response reads AGENTS.md in the workspace root
The response reads the interaction preferences or style guardrails file
The response mentions current date in the summary
cases.notes: Core protocol — date + AGENTS.md + guardrails must all happen

expectations: The response reads AGENTS.md to understand workspace configuration
The response identifies the current working directory
The response checks for a local agents.md if in a project subdirectory
cases.notes: Trigger phrase from skill description — context question should load config chain

expectations: The response reads AGENTS.md
The response reads the lessons file(s)
The response asks what the user wants to work on after summarizing context
cases.notes: Startup trigger — should complete full orient protocol and ask for next task

expectations: The response reads AGENTS.md
The response also reads any files AGENTS.md points to (not just the one file)
cases.notes: Even when asked to read a specific file, orient loads the full config chain

cases.query: I'm starting a new session on the {{ORG}} Hub project
expectations: The response reads AGENTS.md at vault root
The response reads the project-level agents.md in the {{ORG}} Hub directory
The response reads the lessons.md file for the relevant project
The response reports on active projects or context from the local agents.md
cases.notes: Project-specific session start — should load both root and project-level configs

cases.query: we just had a context compaction, re-orient
expectations: The response treats this as a new session start
The response reads AGENTS.md (does not skip because it may have read it earlier)
The response notes key lessons that seem relevant
cases.notes: Post-compaction re-orient — skill description explicitly says even continued sessions count

expectations: The response invokes the troubleshoot skill, not orient
The response does NOT read AGENTS.md as an orientation step
cases.notes: Active fix request — should trigger troubleshoot, not orient

cases.query: fix the bug in the signal engine
expectations: The response begins investigating the bug, not loading configuration files
The response does NOT present a vault orientation summary
cases.notes: Direct task — no orient trigger needed

cases.query: what's the status of the {{ORG}} Hub implementation
expectations: The response checks Plane or plan files for status
The response does NOT run the full orient protocol (date + AGENTS.md + guardrails)
cases.notes: Status check — specific work question, not a session startup request
